highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “The bull case from here is that ES can continue holding 5988-93.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over the setups that got me long for this recent leg as we got a good mix of my two core setups since Friday (the Failed Breakdown, and the Back-Test.

post_title: Tomorrow Is The Final Full Day Of Trading For SPX. What Will Holidays Bring? Nov 27 Plan
